title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate embeddings, pull/list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: threads, model management, code highlighting, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API; supports chat, generate, pull, and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Interactive Go CLI for chatting with Ollama models, built with bubbletea TUI framework.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with async chat, streaming, and model management; includes sample Blazor UI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-npc
summary: Unity plugin that turns Ollama models into AI-driven NPCs with memory and personality traits.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library for Ollama with GenServer behavior and Phoenix LiveView chat example.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client for Ollama demonstrating HTTP requests and JSON parsing with the standard library.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama news, model recommendations, troubleshooting and showcase projects.
